title: Israeli Airstrikes Target Residential Areas in Southern Lebanon
detail: Israeli forces conducted bombing attacks on residential homes in southern Lebanon, marking an escalation in cross-border operations. The strikes targeted civilian infrastructure in what appears to be an expansion of military operations beyond the Gaza theater.

media.caption: Footage shows aftermath of Israeli bombing attacks on residential homes in southern Lebanon

title: Trump Announces 10-Day Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire Agreement
detail: President Trump announced a 10-day ceasefire agreement between Israel and Lebanon, marking a significant diplomatic breakthrough in the ongoing regional conflict. The announcement comes amid escalating tensions following recent Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon.

media.caption: President Trump announcing the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire agreement

title: European Union Welcomes Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Urges Sovereignty Respect
detail: The European Union officially welcomed the announced ceasefire between Israel and Lebanon while emphasizing the importance of respecting Lebanon's sovereignty. The EU statement reflects international support for de-escalation efforts in the region.

media.caption: Lebanon cemetery scene amid ongoing tensions with Israel
